div1.entryFree:
Pelt, to throw as with pellets; intr. do p. so fast at one another's pate, H6A III, 1, 82. bide the --ing of this pitiless storm, Lr. III, 4, 29. == to throw out words, to use abusive language, to curse: another smothered seems to p. and swear, Lucr. 1418.
Trans.: the chidden billow seems to p. the clouds, Oth. II, 1, 12.
